positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical composition of bioluminescent fantasy flora and celestial elements. Focus on glowing crystal mushrooms, delicate stardust trails, and abstract nebula geometry. The overall style should be a blend of detailed vintage botanical illustration and clean, graphic mid-century modern poster art. Use bold, clean silhouettes, strong contrast, and a vibrant, harmonious palette of deep indigo, teal, electric cyan, and shimmering gold. The composition must be perfectly centered and isolated on a plain background, optimized for a scalable t-shirt print.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, blur, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grainy, messy, low detail, realistic photo, cropped, out of focus
